blended.narrative: Boyne Highlands is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 7 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 6 ft. Looking ahead, 41 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 6" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 12" of heavy snow, highs of 28°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 15" of heavy snow, highs of 27°F, winds around 23 mph. Expect powder.
Tuesday: 2.0" of snow, highs of 16°F. Expect powder.
